biography.value: An Ancient Stone summoned is not a decision about a fight. It is a decision about a place — this ground, held against everything, for as long as necessary. Continental Tremor resets the battlefield completely on arrival. World Crush removes individuals permanently from the engagement. DR 9 combined with Stone Skin and regeneration means mundane weapons accomplish essentially nothing. The Ancient Stone is old enough and intelligent enough to follow complex orders without misinterpretation, and patient enough that it does not distinguish between a fight that lasts ten minutes and one that lasts ten hours. Both are the same to it.

system.attacksNotes:
• World Crush [Combat]: Melee attack (Agi 2 + Melee Combat 8), Reach: 20 ft
    • Margin 1: 16 damage (Huge, heavy: 14 + 2)
    • Margin 2: 24 damage (16 + 8 Str); target Grappled + Restrained + Prone; takes 16 bludgeoning damage at start of each of their turns; no save; Fortitude save (Hard task, 2 successes) each round to break free
    • Margin 3: 24 damage + Grappled + Restrained + Prone; target begins Engulf — driven 5 feet into the ground at start of their next turn unless they succeed on a Fortitude save (Hard task), adding Blinded and doubling ongoing damage to 32
  • Mountain Hurl [Combat]: Ranged attack (Dex 2 + Ranged Combat 2), Range: 120/240 ft
    • Margin 1: 20 damage
    • Margin 2: 20 damage; target knocked Prone + Stunned + all creatures within 10 feet take 8 bludgeoning damage from impact debris; no save on debris
system.specialAbilitiesNotes:
• Immovable: Magical forced movement requires winning an opposed check against Str 8 + Might 8 (Hard task, 2 successes). Non-magical forced movement is impossible.
  • Earth Bond: Regenerates 12 HP per turn.
  • Continental Tremor (1/day) [Combat]: As 2 [Combat] actions, releases the earth's full force in an 80-foot radius. Every non-designated creature on natural ground makes a Fortitude save (Hard task, 2 successes). Failure: 40 bludgeoning damage + Restrained for 1 hour; requires excavation to escape. 1 success: 20 damage + Prone. 2 successes: 10 damage only. Structures in the area take major structural damage.
  • Piercing and Slashing Immunity Sharing: The summoner and up to 4 designated allies gain immunity to non-magical piercing and slashing damage while within 60 feet.
system.reactionsNotes: • Stone Skin [Reaction]: Once per round, reduce incoming physical damage by 14.
